steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice specifies Conti's role in neutrino research. The key note: Conti is known for research on solar and geoneutrinos. A good answer must name Conti and connect him to that specific research.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Particle physicist Alessandro Conti has worked to advance the scientific understanding of neutrinos through his research on solar and geoneutrinos.: Names Conti and specifies solar and geoneutrinos — exactly what the question requires. ✓
  • Choice B — Neutrinos are a type of subatomic particle that particle physicists are still trying to understand.: Does not mention Conti at all. ✗
  • Choice C — First discovered in the mid-twentieth century, neutrinos are a type of subatomic particle.: Does not mention Conti at all. ✗
  • Choice D — Alessandro Conti is recognized for his particle physics research.: Names Conti but uses the vague phrase "particle physics research" instead of specifying solar and geoneutrinos. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
